name: Rime-Draped Sprouts
passive_desc: Increases Resonance Skill DMG by 20%. Upon dealing DMG with Resonance Skill, restores 8 Resonance Energy. Can trigger once every 8s.
description: A rectifier wrapped in eternal frost that paradoxically nurtures new growth. Delicate ice crystals form and shatter with each activation, leaving trails of blooming rime in their wake.
